zh.lifeSummary: 當Pierre De Savoie I於大約1047年出生在法國o-阿爾培斯豪-薩福薩藍徹斯時，他的父親Count Oddone di Savoia28歲，母親Adelaide di Susa34歲。他和Agnès de Poitiers至少有2個女兒。他去世於1078年7月9日在法國享年32歲，埋葬在義大利皮蒙特托利諾托利諾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Pierre De Savoie I于大约1047年出生在法国o-阿爾培斯豪-薩福薩藍徹斯时，他的父亲Count Oddone di Savoia28岁，母亲Adelaide di Susa34岁。他和Agnès de Poitiers至少有2个女儿。他去世于1078年7月9日在法国享年32岁，埋葬在意大利皮蒙特托利諾托利諾。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Savoie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Pierre, Marcel, Damien, Jacques, Normand, Raoul, Alphonse, Antoine, Armand, Julien, Alcee.
French: habitational name from Savoy (French name Savoie), a region in the southeastern part of France, or from (La) Savoie, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Savoy .

History: Savoy was consolidated in the 11th century by count Humbert the White-Handed (Humbert aux blanches-mains). He was the founder of the great European noble house of Savoy, with large holdings of territory in France, Switzerland, and present-day Italy.

variants.name: Savoy
meanings: Altered form of French   Savoie  . It is also found in England, as an Anglicized surname of Huguenot origin.

variants.name: Savoia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Salvatore, Antonio, Dante, Enzo, Franco, Italo, Piero, Reno, Umberto, Vito.
Italian: habitational name from Savoy, in France, named Savoia in Italian. See Savoie .

nameMeanings.name: Pierre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Pierre De Savoie I was born about 1047, in Sallanches, Haute-Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Count Oddone di Savoia, was 28 and his mother, Adelaide di Susa, was 34. He had at least 2 daughters with Agnès de Poitiers. He died on 9 July 1078, in France, at the age of 32, and was buried in Turin, Turin, Piedmont, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pierre De Savoie I est né environ 1047, à Sallanches, Haute-Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Count Oddone di Savoia, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Adelaide di Susa, avait 34 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Agnès de Poitiers. Il est décédé le 9 juillet 1078, à France, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterré à Torino, Torino, Piemonte, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Pierre De Savoie I um 1047 in Sallanches, Haute-Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Count Oddone di Savoia 28 und seine Mutter Adelaide di Susa 34. Er hatte mit Agnès de Poitiers mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. Juli 1078 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Frankreich und wurde in Turin, Torino, Piemonte, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Pierre De Savoie I è nato il circa 1047 nel Sallanches, Haute-Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, il suo padre, Count Oddone di Savoia, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Adelaide di Susa, aveva 34 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie con Agnès de Poitiers. Morì il 9 luglio 1078, nel Francia, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolto a Torino, Torino, Piemonte, Italia.

ja.Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France: フランスルhoネ-アルペスサボイ
ja.Chambéry, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes,: フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスサボイチャンブeリー
ja.lifeSummary: Pierre De Savoie Iが約1047年にフランスルhoネ-アルペスハウテ-サボイサランチェスで生まれた時，父Count Oddone di Savoiaは28歳，母Adelaide di Susaは34歳であった。彼はAgnès de Poitiersとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1078年7月9日にフランスで32歳で死去し，イタリアピエモントトリノトリノにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Pierre De Savoie I(이)가 대략 1047년 프랑스 ho니-알프스 하테-사보이 샐랭체스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Count Oddone di Savoia(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelaide di Susa(은)는 34세였다. 그는 Agnès de Poitiers(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1078년 7월 9일 프랑스에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 피몽 토리노 토리노에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Pierre De Savoie I nasceu aproximadamente 1047, em Sallanches, Haute-Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Count Oddone di Savoia, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Adelaide di Susa, tinha 34 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Agnès de Poitiers. Ele faleceu em 9 de julho de 1078, em França, com 32 anos, e foi sepultado em Torino, Torino, Piemonte, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pierre De Savoie I родился около 1047 г. в местности салланчесь, хауте-савои, рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Count Oddone di Savoia было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelaide di Susa, 34. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Agnès de Poitiers. Он умер 9 июля 1078 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 32 лет и был похоронен в местности торино, торино, пиемонт, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Pierre De Savoie I nació aproximadamente 1047, en Sallanches, Haute-Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Count Oddone di Savoia, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Adelaide di Susa, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Agnès de Poitiers. Murió el 9 de julio de 1078, en Francia, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultado en Torino, Torino, Piemonte, Italia.
